name: GetMoreReviews
description:
What GetMoreReviews Does

GetMoreReviews specializes in review request campaigns and generating new reviews. Their automations and integration make it very seamless to connect with customers across channels and ‘get more reviews’ for your business. They also have some social sharing functionalities for promoting customer feedback.

‍

Source: getmorereviews.com

Key Features

  • Automated sending of review requests through seamless integrations with your existing systems.
  • Bulk upload capabilities allow you to instantly invite large customer lists for reviews.
  • On-demand individual review requests can be sent directly from the account dashboard.
  • Engage customers effectively with email and SMS text campaigns soliciting feedback.
  • Automated reminders help maximize response rates from your outreach efforts.
  • Embedded website widgets and tools make it easy to collect reviews on your own channels.
  • Reputation monitoring alerts notify you of new incoming reviews across platforms.
  • Positive reviews can be automatically published to your Facebook page with one click.

Benefits of GetMoreReviews

  • Remove manual efforts - reviews are solicited automatically through integrated processes.
  • Reach more customers effortlessly by uploading massive customer lists in bulk.
  • Flexibility to send individual review requests on-demand directly from the dashboard.
  • Multi-channel outreach through email and SMS boosts review acquisition.
  • Automated reminders maximize your review generation output.
  • Make it super simple for customers to share feedback through on-site review collection tools.

Pricing

Offers custom prices for all services

Pros

✅Ease of usage

✅Good mobile interface, which makes it very accessible for all types of users

Cons

❌Very costly

❌UI is a bit outdated
